strategy.name: ICT Silver Bullet
strategy.description: Time-based intraday strategy. Three 1-hour kill zones in New York time. Inside each window, take entries in the direction of the higher-timeframe bias when a Fair Value Gap (FVG) forms aligned with that bias.

indicators.htf_ema50_1h: Higher-timeframe bias. Price above EMA(50) on 1H = long bias. Below = short bias.
indicators.fair_value_gap: Three-bar inefficiency. Bullish FVG: candle[2].low > candle[0].high. Bearish FVG: candle[2].high < candle[0].low. Look for FVG aligned with HTF bias inside the active kill zone.
indicators.kill_zone_clock: Trade only when the current NY hour is one of 03, 10, or 14.
indicators.liquidity_sweep: Wick that pierces the previous day's high/low and closes back inside. Long bias requires a sweep BELOW PDL (bears trapped). Short bias requires a sweep ABOVE PDH (bulls trapped). Lookback covers current + previous session (~48h on 15m).

long: Active kill zone (London / AM / PM in NY time)
HTF bias is long — price above 1H EMA(50)
Recent bullish FVG within the last 20 bars on the entry timeframe
Price not more than 1.5% away from 1H EMA(50)
Liquidity sweep below PDL within current or previous session
short: Active kill zone (London / AM / PM in NY time)
HTF bias is short — price below 1H EMA(50)
Recent bearish FVG within the last 20 bars on the entry timeframe
Price not more than 1.5% away from 1H EMA(50)
Liquidity sweep above PDH within current or previous session

exit_rules: Stop-loss: opposite edge of the FVG that triggered entry (FVG bottom for longs, FVG top for shorts)
Take-profit: 2R — twice the distance from entry to stop-loss
Hard time stop: close any open position at the end of its kill zone window
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Do not trade outside the three NY kill zones
Paper trade first — validate on your specific asset before going live
notes: ICT Silver Bullet is a time-of-day strategy. Recommended entry timeframe: 5m to 15m. HTF bias filter is fixed at 1H EMA(50).
